title: I was giving my coding agent context the wrong way...
summary: AI Jason presents a lesson on optimizing how context is provided to coding agents, suggesting prior practice was suboptimal. The content references a codebase harness skill and directs viewers to resources including the AI Builder Club and Superdesign tool.
writeup: The video reframes how context gets supplied to coding agents, with AI Jason arguing that common prior practice was suboptimal. It centers on a codebase harness skill as the mechanism for structuring that context, tying the lesson to context management and prompt engineering for agents. The takeaway is a revised approach to feeding agents codebase context, with pointers to additional resources including the AI Builder Club and the Superdesign tool.
